title: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for year 1994-95
description: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for year 1994-95
text: REGD. NO. D.L.—33004/95 The Gazette Of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II--Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 409] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, OCTOBER 5, 1995/ASVINA 13, 1917 2443 GI/95 ( 1 ) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THi; GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OP FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th October, 1995 G.S.R. 679(B) . — I n exercise of the poweies conferred by clause, (a) of Section 8 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Finance (Department of; Revenue) S.O. No./GSR No. 415(E) dated the, 26th April, 1994, the Central Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Board consisting of : Chairman : 1. Hon'ble Mr. Justice P. K. Bahri, Judge of Delhi High Court. Members : 2. Hon'ble Mr. Justice R. C. Lahoti, Judge of Delhi High Court. 3. Hon'ble Mr. Justice D. K. Jain, Judge of Delhi High Court. [F. No. 674/1/95/Cus. VIII] ROOP CHAND, Under Secy. Printed by the Manager, Govt of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapurl, New DeIhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhl-110054 1995 -- 2 of 2 --
